findings.title: Seeded account 'alice' returns 401
findings.description: The seeded test account 'alice' with documented password 'alice123' returns 401 even after attempting registration.
findings.suggested_fix: Ensure seeded test accounts are created on startup

findings.title: Improper Input Validation
findings.description: The API does not properly validate the input data, allowing for potential security vulnerabilities.
findings.reproduction: Send a POST request to https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/auth/register with the body: {"username": 12345, "password": true, "body": 999, "age": "not_a_number"}
findings.expected: The API should validate the input data to ensure it conforms to expected formats.
findings.actual: The API did not validate the input data, resulting in a 500 Internal Server Error.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement proper input validation to ensure that the data conforms to expected formats.

findings.title: Inconsistent Schema
findings.description: The API request body contains unexpected properties ("body": 999) and invalid data types ("username": 12345, "password": true, "age": "not_a_number").
findings.reproduction: Send a POST request to https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/auth/register with the body: {"username": 12345, "password": true, "body": 999, "age": "not_a_number"}
findings.expected: The API should expect a consistent schema for the request body.
findings.actual: The API did not enforce a consistent schema for the request body.
findings.suggested_fix: Define and enforce a consistent schema for the request body.

findings.title: Inadequate Error Handling
findings.description: The API returns a generic 500 Internal Server Error without providing any additional information.
findings.reproduction: Send a POST request to https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/auth/register with the body: {"username": 12345, "password": true, "body": 999, "age": "not_a_number"}
findings.expected: The API should provide more detailed error information.
findings.actual: The API returned a generic 500 Internal Server Error.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement more detailed error handling and return specific error messages.

findings.title: Potential Authentication Issue
findings.description: The API does not appear to implement authentication for the register endpoint.
findings.reproduction: Send a POST request to https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/auth/register with the body: {"username": 12345, "password": true, "body": 999, "age": "not_a_number"}
findings.expected: The API should implement authentication and authorization for sensitive endpoints.
findings.actual: The API does not appear to implement authentication for the register endpoint.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement authentication and authorization for sensitive endpoints.

findings.title: Potential Business Logic Issue
findings.description: The API does not appear to validate the age field as a number.
findings.reproduction: Send a POST request to https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/auth/register with the body: {"username": 12345, "password": true, "body": 999, "age": "not_a_number"}
findings.expected: The API should validate the age field as a number.
findings.actual: The API did not validate the age field as a number.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement business logic to validate the age field as a number.

findings.title: Unexpected Status Code
findings.description: The API returned a 500 Internal Server Error status code, which may indicate an issue with the server.
findings.expected: A successful status code (200-299) or a well-formed error response
findings.suggested_fix: Verify server-side logs to determine the root cause of the error and implement a fix.

findings.title: Lack of Detailed Error Information
findings.description: The error response did not provide detailed information about the error.
findings.expected: A detailed error message or a well-formed error response
findings.suggested_fix: Implement a standardized error handling mechanism that provides detailed error information.

findings.title: Double-like allowed on post
findings.description: Liking the same post twice returns 200 both times.
findings.reproduction: POST https://backend-agent-test.onrender.com/posts/353/like twice with same auth token
findings.suggested_fix: Return 409 Conflict when user has already liked the post

findings.title: No rate limiting on /auth/login
findings.description: Sent 20 rapid requests to /auth/login and none were rate-limited (no 429 status).
findings.expected: 429 Too Many Requests after several attempts
findings.suggested_fix: Implement rate limiting on sensitive endpoints

findings.title: IDOR: User2 can delete User1's post 353
findings.description: User2 was able to delete post 353 owned by User1. The API returned 200 instead of 403.
findings.suggested_fix: Verify resource ownership before allowing deletion
